# Lucide Icons Library

## Non-Minified Source File Required

The non-minified source file `lucide.js` needs to be downloaded manually.

### Download Instructions

1. Visit: https://github.com/lucide-icons/lucide/releases
2. Download the release archive or use npm:
   ```bash
   npm install lucide@latest
   cp node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.js assets/vendor/lucide/lucide.js
   ```

### Alternative: Use CDN

```bash
# Download from jsdelivr (check latest version)
curl -o lucide.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lucide@latest/dist/umd/lucide.js
```
